title: Amazon Bedrock Foundation Model
description: Schema representing an Amazon Bedrock foundation model and its capabilities.

modelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the foundation model.

modelId.description: The unique identifier for the foundation model (e.g., anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0).

modelName.description: The display name of the foundation model.

providerName.description: The name of the model provider.

inputModalities.description: The input modalities supported by the model.

outputModalities.description: The output modalities supported by the model.

responseStreamingSupported.description: Whether the model supports response streaming.

customizationsSupported.description: The customization types supported by the model.

inferenceTypesSupported.description: The inference types supported by the model.

status.description: The lifecycle status of the model.
